user_query: I'm organizing an AI conference and I need information about AI companies and influential people in the field.

TaskList.description: Gather a list of AI companies including their names, overviews, websites, locations, and LinkedIn profiles.
Retrieve information about influential people in the AI field including their names, bios, locations, and Twitter profiles.
Compile results from Subtask 1 and Subtask 2 into a cohesive document for conference planning.
